name: Seigaiha
description: The classic blue-ocean wave crests, fan inside fan — every redraw lets the tide swell and recolor scale by scale.

code.style: --crest: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color4)); --foam: @p(var(--color0), var(--color3)); --rule: ( z-index: calc(100 - @y); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -6%; width: 112%; bottom: -14%; height: @rand(96%, 116%); border-radius: 999px 999px 0 0; background: var(--crest); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 14%; width: 72%; bottom: -14%; height: @rand(54%, 70%); border-radius: 999px 999px 0 0; background: var(--foam); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
